title: Alter table to add Fkey....
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t4 (id Int32, description String, PRIMARY KEY (id));
CREATE TABLE t5 (ref_id Int32, value Float64, PRIMARY KEY (ref_id));
SELECT t4.id, t4.description, t5.value FROM t4 LEFT JOIN t5 ON t4.id = t5.ref_id;
key_bug_features: Adding foreign key constraints to existing tables
